sheet.description: You were born with one of the praised techniques of the Zenin Clan, turning animation into reality.

description.p: Beginning at 1st level, you learn the projection technique, which gives you the possibility to divide 1 second into 24 frames which allows you to move faster. As a bonus action for 1 Cursed Energy, your walking speed increases by 10 feet and you will gain an additional attack on your Attack Action. However, this cursed technique is not perfect as you cannot change your movement course once you start, so when your turn ends you pick the spot you want to move to, due to your speed it will be impossible to change course. If you do not end your next turn in that space, your speed becomes 0 until the end of your next turn. You must spend 1 Cursed Energy at the beginning of your turns to keep this cursed technique active.

sheet.description: For 1 CE, your walking speed increases by 10 feet and gain an additional attack on your Attack Action. When your turn ends pick a spot to move to. If you do not end your next turn in that space, your speed becomes 0 until the end of your next turn. Spend 1 CE at the beginning of your turns to keep this cursed technique active.

description.p: When you get to 3rd level, for every consecutive turn with Projection active your movement speed increases by 10 feet. If you charge in a straight line building momentum you can deal an additional d6 for every 10 feet on your next attack.

sheet.description: For every consecutive turn with Projection active, your movement speed increases by 10 feet. If you move in a straight line deal an additional d6 for every 10 feet moved on your next attack.

description.p: Once you reach 6th level, you have learned how to affect creatures with the 24 FPS rule, making them become stuck in one frame of animation. While your cursed technique is active, when you hit an unarmed strike on a creature you can choose to deal no damage by spending 2 Cursed Energy, forcing the creature to make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failure they will be stuck in one frame of animation, making them stunned until the beginning of your next turn. The creature loses its stunned condition early if it is hit by an attack which will automatically count as a critical. This critical ignores damage resistance and treats damage immunity as resistance.

sheet.description: While Projection is active, when you hit an unarmed strike on a creature you can force it to make an Intelligence saving throw for 2 CE instead of doing damage. On a failure they are stunned until the beginning of your next turn. The first attack it takes automatically crits and it loses the stunned condition. This critical ignores damage resistance and treats damage immunity as resistance.

description.p: At 11th level, due to your advanced studies, you can now reach a higher speed level than any sorcerer ever could. While your cursed technique is active, you will gain the following benefits:

ul.li: You gain +30 feet to your walking speed.
You gain +20 feet to your walking speed at the beginning of your turns.
You have advantage on Dexterity saving throws.
Your Dexterity score increases by +2 ignoring your maximum.

sheet.description: While Projection is active, your walking speed increases by 30 ft. and an additional 20 ft. at the beginning of your turns, you have advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and your Dexterity score increases by +2 ignoring your maximum.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Lunar Palace Womb of Time

description.p: Finally, at 18th level, you reach the pinnacle of Projection Sorcery. All creatures in your domain take 8d10 Necrotic damage when they move or take any type of action, since their cells don't follow the 24fps rule.

sheet.description: All creatures in your domain take 8d10 Necrotic damage when they move or take any type of action.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Lunar Palace Womb of Time Replacement
